behavior_summary: U8P_SKULZ::look is a simple U8P_SKULZ::look/inspect handler for the SKULZ entity: when the player examines SKULZ it emits a short bark/text "skull " and then the U8P_SKULZ::look process yields or ends.
No game-state flags are read or written and there are no external calls or menus involved.
There are two low-confidence/unknown nodes present in the raw which leave minor uncertainty about exact termination semantics, but the visible bark and subsequent suspend are clear.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SKULZ::look executes a single Bark node (player-facing text) followed immediately by a suspend/termination node — i.e., speak then yield/end the process.
No branching, loops, or conditionals are present.
open_questions: What do the two Unknown/raw nodes represent (possible bookkeeping, formatting, or a no-op)?
Does the suspend node behave as a temporary yield or as a final termination for this U8P_SKULZ::look process in the engine's semantics?
Is the trailing space in the bark text "skull " intentional (formatting) or an artifact of extraction?

main_function.name: U8P_SKULZ::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player 'looks at' or examines the SKULZ entity by emitting the text "skull " and then suspending/ending the U8P_SKULZ::look process.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player uses the U8P_SKULZ::look/examine action on SKULZ.
Process type 0x0208 indicates it runs as an object/NPC U8P_SKULZ::look handler.

function_map.name: U8P_SKULZ::look
function_map.role: U8P_SKULZ::look/inspect handler that emits a single bark and then suspends/ends

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_SKULZ::look is a simple U8P_SKULZ::look/inspect handler for the SKULZ entity: when the player examines SKULZ it emits a short bark/text "skull " and then the U8P_SKULZ::look process yields or ends.
